steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that Little Badger “is not the only Indigenous writer to blend traditional stories with popular literature,” highlighting that multiple Indigenous authors do this.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B says recent Indigenous fiction writers are mixing traditional stories with popular literary genres, which directly reflects the signal.

The other three either introduce ideas not mentioned in the passage (sales increase, influence on non‑Indigenous writers, advice to non‑Indigenous authors) or reverse the relationship.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
